t_title: klink plugin toolbar - top-right of every KLayout window
t_k: K8765  =  port badge - this window is session 8765
t_send: SEND  =  selection -> durable id (agent recalls 'the one I just sent')
t_gftgt: GFTGT  =  mark this window as the gdsfactory/klive target (port 8082)
banner: One agent controls many KLayouts - each window = one port (session), self-identified by the toolbar K876x badge
s_detail: status: sent - 5 objects - send_seq increments monotonically -> agent stores it as sel_xxxx; 'the one I just sent' now points to it
g_title: GFTGT: mark this window as the gdsfactory / klive target
g_detail: klive_target_session = K8767 -> gf/photonics code writes into this window via klive (8082)
b_before: (1) before transfer: K8767 has only an empty landing frame
a_title: (2) cross-window transfer: device from K8765 -> K8767
a_detail: flat-selection, two phases: dry-run inserted 0 -> commit inserted 5 (10/0 x3 + 20/0 x2)
